ddls:
CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* Original text in the source language */,
  "target_text" TEXT /* Translated text in the target language */,
  "translator_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the translator */,
  "developer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the game developers */,
  "fuzzy" INTEGER /* Indicator if the translation is fuzzy or approximate */,
  "context" INTEGER /* Contextual information for the translation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was last updated */,
  "translation_memory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation memory entry (e.g., TMX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_memories" (
  "translation_memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation memory entry */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* Original text in the source language */,
  "target_text" TEXT /* Translated text in the target language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation memory entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_memory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "locale_code" TEXT /* Locale code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translators" (
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translator */,
  "translator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the translator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the translator */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language the translator specializes in */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Type of specialization (e.g., technical, literary) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Hourly rate of the translator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task is part of */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translator assigned to the task */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation to be completed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., assigned, in progress, completed) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words to be translated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_tasks_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES translators ("translator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language the reviewer specializes in */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Type of specialization (e.g., technical, literary) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Hourly rate of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the translation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the translation quality */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., text, audio, image) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the asset is associated with */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., dialogue, quest description) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_translations" (
  "asset_translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game asset */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset translation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_translations_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_translations_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES game_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_localization" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio localization task */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game asset */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voice actor */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date the audio was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audio localization (e.g., recorded, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_localization_voice_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("voice_actor_id") REFERENCES voice_actors ("voice_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_localization_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES game_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the voice actor */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language the voice actor specializes in */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Type of specialization (e.g., male, female, child) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Hourly rate of the voice actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voice_actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation affected by the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the game */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the integration is part of */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being integrated */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation being integrated */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "build_version" TEXT /* Version of the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_integrations_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES game_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_integrations_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translator */,
  "translation_rate" REAL /* Rate of translation speed */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate in translations */,
  "average_review_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for reviews */,
  "total_words_translated" INTEGER /* Total number of words translated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES translators ("translator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the invoice is associated with */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
